---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Time Series Log Interval"
image: social-cards/time-series-log-interval.png
---

# 🏗️ Log Interval {#sec-time-series-log-interval}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Log Interval
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
